request.description: Deletes a specific book by their ID
Finds a specific book by their ID
Updates a Book's information by passing a JSON, XML or YML representation of the book
Adds a new book by passing a JSON, XML or YML representation of the book
Deletes a specific person by their ID
Finds a specific person by their ID
Updates a Person's information by passing a JSON, XML or YML representation of the person
Adds a new person by passing a JSON, XML or YML representation of the person
